channel.title: Ens on Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Ens on Portfolio

item.title: About Me
item.description:
I am a passionate full-stack developer specializing in modern web and mobile applications. I focus on building scalable, user-friendly solutions using technologies like React Native, Node.js, and MongoDB.

I have experience developing cross-platform mobile apps and backend systems, with a strong interest in performance optimization, clean architecture, and intuitive user experiences.

One of my key projects is LicenseHero, a full-stack mobile application designed to modernize driving license preparation through interactive and memory-focused learning techniques. It leverages spaced repetition, adaptive quizzes, and real-time progress tracking to improve knowledge retention.
